steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to request refund of EUR 3,093.75 overpayment on DBK dividend (account 801234567)
Provide documentation showing DE-NO treaty rate should be 26.375% withholding, not 25% applied
If custodian cannot process refund, file claim with German BZSt using refund procedure for investment income
Submit Norwegian tax residency certificate and treaty benefit claim form to support lower withholding rate

references.title: BZSt – Capital Yield Tax Relief / Refund Procedures
